title: Maintenance: Printer
description:
Cleaning and resetting ink pad
Remarks: Units is working and tested

title: Maintenance: Epson L5290
description:
The printer\'s wasted ink is leaking from the ink absorber, the printer needs to be replaced and maintained.
Remarks: Units is working and tested good

title: Maintenance: Epson L6270
description:
I checked the printout and also inspected the printer\'s interior to see if there were any scattered inks on the printer\'s chassis. So far it\'s ok, the only problem I see is that its maintenance box is almost full.
Remarks: Replace for maintenance box

title: Maintenance: Sharp Copier
description:
Check why the copier always misfeeds in tray 1.
Remarks: Replace Paper feed roller, separate roller and pickup roller
